canonical_answer: An elderly man with white hair wearing a plaid shirt and blue apron stands behind a wooden kitchen counter while using his hands to toss green leafy vegetables inside a large silver metal mixing bowl. Clear and dark bottles sit on the counter to the right of the bowl, and a circular logo for The Jacques Pépin Foundation is displayed in the bottom left corner.

canonical_answer: At 4s, the man wearing a blue apron tosses green leafy vegetables in a silver bowl; at 14s, he pours yellow oil from a clear plastic bottle into the mixture; at 18s, text overlays indicate specific measurements for the ingredients on screen.
